## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Be specific — which plugin(s) does it affect? -->

## Related issue
<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses, if any. Example: Closes #123 -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New plugin
- [ ] Plugin improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Testing done
<!-- Describe how you tested this. Include: nself version, OS, plugin name, test commands. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] CI checks pass
- [ ] `nself plugin install <name>` succeeds end-to-end
- [ ] Plugin manifest (`plugin.json`) is valid
- [ ] `registry.json` updated (if adding or modifying a plugin)
- [ ] Documentation updated (wiki page, README)
- [ ] No AI attribution in commits or PR description
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if user-visible change)
